goal: Help an AI agent or developer recover from one blocked execution error.
buyer: Developer or AI agent runtime blocked by a failed command.
pain: The agent cannot proceed because the root cause and next safe command are unclear.
result: A concise repair receipt with likely cause, next command, retry plan, risk note, and prevention note.
cta: Read the agent contract, then pay through the Stripe buy path.
limitations: Machine Payments Protocol is not implemented
